indicators.name: low flat work surface
indicators.rationale: The bed is not suitable for prolonged computer work due to its low flat surface and lack of ergonomics.

indicators.name: no dedicated desk or table
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chair or seating arrangement is present for comfortable extended computer use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no direct task lighting for the computer screens.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace layout
indicators.rationale: The room is not set up for focused solo work, as it lacks a dedicated workspace.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The low flat surface of the bed and the absence of a dedicated desk or ergonomic seating make it challenging to set up a comfortable workstation. There is also no task lighting, and the layout does not support focused solo work.
